title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Kaido, Unknown person #9, Nami, Luffy as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We will put open-sama to rest here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and he will be surrounded by all his allies. Starting with Yasuie-dono...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and all the other Daimyo who fought for this country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kapapa! Think we'll be honored here someday too, onimaru?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's good to see you alive and well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is that fine with you, Marco- Dono?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course! It's only right that his final resting place is in his home country....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seems like I've been left behind once again to say goodbye...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We are the ones who remain...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If something were to happen to any more of our heroes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...I don't think I could take it....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let us pray for their good health.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm so hungry... NO! I'm not!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: brother!! You've got to hear this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Will you ever stop being a tomboy!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Luffy, zero!! Save some room for later!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have been waiting for you two to wake, so I could summon the whole country for a huge banquet!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, don't you recognize me?! I'm momo- Nosuke!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it cause you've got open's blood? Lemme take a crack at you!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
